    Prospective Students

    I am looking for motivated PhD students and pre-doctoral researchers interested in machine learning theory, human-AI interaction, and responsible AI. If you are interested, please email me at aarpit [at] cse.iitb.ac.in with your CV and a brief description of your research interests.

    I also welcome IIT Bombay undergraduate and master’s students for research projects (BTP/DDP/RnD).
